creator: tg@ihf.rwth-aachen.de
text:
hanspb@persbraten.vgs.no writes:

> >Description:
> When I log in using xdm my env variables in /etc/login.conf isn't set.
> cpu limits etc are set! env variables works from programs calling login.
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Login using xdm and have a env variable in /etc/login.conf

Are you using xdm from the XFree86 distribution or the one from ports?

The ports have a patch to support login classes (patch-ae).

tg
